title.en: Chlorophyll a vs b — Two Absorption Windows
title.ko: 엽록소 a vs b — 두 흡수 창

subtitle.en: chlorophyll a peaks at 430 + 662 nm; chlorophyll b at 453 + 642 nm — together they catch slightly different blue and red bands, and leave green to reflect
subtitle.ko: 엽록소 a는 430·662 nm, b는 453·642 nm — 함께 청·적색을 흡수하고 녹색은 반사

description.en: Spectrum strip + Gaussian-fit chlorophyll a and b curves. Toggle a / b / both to overlay; combined absorbance darkens the blue and red ends and leaves the green window open.
description.ko: 스펙트럼 스트립 + 가우시안 엽록소 a/b 곡선. a/b/both 토글; 결합 흡수가 청·적 어둡게, 녹 창 열림.
